score_rationale: Strong relevance to user profile (22yo factory worker, 3500 income, savings rate 46%). Good specificity with concrete data (daily spend 63 yuan, fatigue 11 times, healthy eating 9%, daily calories 1340kcal). Cross-domain connections are well-articulated (fatigue-diet-finance loop, compensatory spending pattern). Recommendations are concrete (add 2 boiled eggs, emotion-consumption firewall) but some interpretations of the 1222 yuan anomaly feel speculative without firm data grounding.
